title: Delivery timeline
body: Standard shipping usually takes 3-6 business days after dispatch. Orders marked delayed should receive a proactive apology and a fresh ETA. If a parcel has no movement for more than 72 hours, create a logistics follow-up task.

title: Return eligibility
body: Most products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if unused, undamaged, and in original packaging. Hygiene products, final-sale items, and customized products are not returnable unless defective.

title: Refund processing
body: Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after warehouse quality check. Store credits can be issued instantly for low-risk cases under Rs. 5000.

title: Cancellation policy
body: Orders can be cancelled before dispatch. If the order has already shipped, the customer should refuse delivery or initiate a return after delivery.

title: Retention offers
body: For delayed orders or repeat customers, agents may offer a 10% coupon capped at Rs. 500. High-risk or high-value cases should be reviewed before issuing compensation.
